description: The Base is an international neo-Nazi organization and paramilitary training network formed in 2018 by Rinaldo Nazzaro. It advocates accelerationist and white nationalist ideology, aiming to establish white ethnostates through terrorism and violent overthrow of governments. The group operates training camps and has links to other far-right extremist groups. It is designated as a terrorist organization in several countries.

country_links.evidence_quote: It is active in the United States , Canada , Australia , South Africa , and Europe
country_links.context: The Base is active in Australia, with recruitment attempts and members.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Belgium, two people were arrested in Ostend and Diepenbeek , one of whom, described as a 'leader', was charged with spreading terrorist messages and attempted recruitment.
country_links.context: Two people were arrested in Belgium in connection with The Base, one charged with spreading terrorist messages.

country_links.evidence_quote: Country: Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Denmark, France, Germany, Italy, Lithuania, Poland, the Netherlands, Romania, Russia, Serbia, Spain, Sweden, Ukraine, the UK and the US.
country_links.context: The Base has a presence in Bulgaria as listed in its country affiliations.
